examples: Rub it on, then immediately wipe it off with a washcloth or tissue.
Skip the washcloth, since it can spread the oil around your body.
I take the washcloth from the shower caddie and gently scrub my feet.
She plunged a washcloth into the bowl of now lukewarm water and gently cleaned him off.
At one point the girl desperately sucked water out of a washcloth.
